creator: taguchi.ch@gmail.com
text:
x11/pixman had a compile issue with an assembler error on my rapsberrypi.
 
entire error message is following:
  CPPAS  pixman-arm-neon-asm.lo

*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/x11/pixman/work/pixman-0.30.0/pixman
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/x11/pixman/work/pixman-0.30.0
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/x11/pixman/work/pixman-0.30.0
*** Error code 1

*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/x11/pixman

Fix: 

i thought, thie error might come from arm-neon-assembler.
therefore, i tried to recompile with "--disable-arm-neon", and compile succeeded.

in the process, i also find a typo in Makefile.

so i make a patch file to fix these problems, and attach it.

this patch will apply "--disable-arm-neon" for "arm" or "armv6" boards.
i think this issue does not affect only RPI, also other arm boards.
because of pixman-arm-neon-asm.S might be not written for FreeBSD.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/x11/pixman
make
